chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl.Tansfer Appln.No.S-27 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.4417/2021 (561-A Cr.PC). 03. For hearing of main case. 01.11.2021 Mr. Ali Nawaz Ghanghro, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl.P.G for the State. None for the private respondents. = * = * = * = * = * = The applicant by making certain allegations has sought for transfer of his criminal case from file of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC, Qamber Shahdadkot, which are denied by him in his comments. By making such denial, he however, has recorded no objection to transfer of the case of the applicant from his file. In order to give an end to controversy, the subject case is transferred to the file of learned Sessions Judge, Qamber-Shahdadkot @ Qamber, with directions that the same to be disposed of by him personally or to be assigned by him to any other Judge of competent jurisdiction of his district for its disposal in accordance with law. The instant Crl.Transfer application is disposed of accordingly alongwith listed application. J U D G E
